---
title: "Climate alignment of finance: different policy playbooks and untapped investment opportunities"
date: "2026-07-10"
author: Jolien Noels
categories: [OECD, external]
---

Please find my blog post on the OECD website: [Climate alignment of finance: different policy playbooks and untapped investment opportunities](https://www.oecd.org/en/blogs/2026/07/climate-alignment-of-finance-different-policy-playbooks-and-untapped-investment-opportunities.html)

![](./policy-mix.png)
